title: astragalus viridis
intro: Astragalus viridis, also known as Mongolian milkvetch, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the pea family (Fabaceae). The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, due to its adaptogenic and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus viridis include enhancing immune function, reducing fatigue and stress, and supporting cardiovascular health, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and anti-aging properties. Astragalus viridis is often prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is also used in combination with other herbs to promote overall well-being.
